title: Fix Calculator Interactivity and Logic
description: The logic behind core calculators (Percentage Calculator, BMI Calculator) and Utility tools (Random Number Generator) is disconnected. The action buttons (e.g., 'Calculate Precise Result', 'Generate') do not trigger state changes or compute accurate results.
acceptanceCriteria: Calculators update their output fields reacting to valid inputs when the primary button is clicked. No console errors occur during computation. Test via browser verification.

title: Implement Mobile Navigation Menu
description: On viewport widths of 375px (Mobile), the Top Navigation links disappear entirely. There is no hamburger menu to browse tools.
acceptanceCriteria: A hamburger menu icon appears on mobile devices triggering a dropdown or side-panel. Clicking links on mobile successfully navigates without layout breakage.

title: Fix Broken Internal Links
description: Several Tool cards on the homepage lead to '#' resolving nowhere. Footer links point out to anchor tags like '#privacy' instead of resolving to the implemented '/legal/' page.
acceptanceCriteria: All tool cards link correctly to their respective routes under '/finance/', '/health/', or '/utility/'. Footer legal links path directly to '/legal/'.

title: Enhance Visual UX Accessibility and Action States
description: Blue buttons on dark backgrounds currently fail color contrast accessibility checks. There are no hover, load, or focus action states on interactive form elements. The Glassmorphism effect is inconsistent causing poor text readability over background images.
acceptanceCriteria: Primary buttons pass WCAG AA contrast. All inputs feature focus rings. Buttons display hover states. Background opacity of tool cards ensures readable text.
